label: DeFi Lending
description: Lend, borrow, withdraw, or repay across DeFi protocols. Shows APY, health factor preview, and collateral ratios per asset.

l0.notes: All 9 checks green after fixes. Error boundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. requiredEntitlements and availableOn set. No any/ts-ignore. No direct mock imports (getAssetParams/calculateHealthFactorDelta accessed via context hook). isLoading wired to FormWidget (false for now; synchronous context). Empty state upgraded from silent text to AlertTriangle error UI. Error state covered by FormWidget via useFormSubmit. Removed 3 dead '(mock)' annotation strings.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS: widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook. 1.2 PASS: context calls useGlobalScope() and filters lendingProtocols, tokenBalances, bridgeRoutes by hasDefiDesk (org scope). 1.3 PASS: org filter empties lendingProtocols when no DeFi desk org selected. 1.4 PARTIAL: clientIds destructured and acknowledged in context; LendingProtocol has no clientId field — full client narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change. 1.5 PASS: strategy filter wired for tradeHistory (scopeStrategyIds). 1.6 PASS: empty scope arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk defaults true). 1.7 KNOWN-GAP: reference data in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

findings.description: getAssetParams and calculateHealthFactorDelta originate in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-protocol-params but are surfaced through DeFiDataContextValue — widget accesses them via useDeFiData(), not via direct mock imports. Check passes for widget file.
Widget did not pass isLoading to FormWidget. Added isLoading=false (synchronous context) wired to FormWidget so skeleton renders when a real async source is connected.
Empty state showed plain text 'No lending protocols (mock).' — upgraded to AlertTriangle error UI and removed '(mock)' annotation.

Error state for form submission already handled via useFormSubmit + FormWidget error prop. Data-loading error not separately exposed by context (context is synchronous). FormWidget error banner is wired.
Removed 3 dead '(mock)' annotation strings: 'No lending protocols (mock).', 'Collateral ratio (mock)', and '(mock ledger)' in toast description.
Client-level cascade not wired — clientIds now destructured and acknowledged in context; LendingProtocol has no clientId field so full narrowing requires BP-5 schema change.
All DeFi reference data (lending protocols, staking protocols, swap tokens, etc.) remains in lib/mocks/fixtures/. Moving to lib/constants/ is a full DeFi context refactor deferred to BP-5.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; lendingProtocols already filtered via adjustedLendingProtocols
